title: Into the Old District
description: The city's forgotten quarter holds shadows and secrets.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You step out into the alley behind your home.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: Are we ready?

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: We're with you every step of the way!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You take a deep breath and carefully open the cedar box. Inside, a beautiful mechanical moth rests on velvet. Its brass wings catch the light.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Whoa! Look at the inside of the lid!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Etched into the lid is a simple compass. Four lights glow softly—north, south, east, and west. The northern light pulses brighter.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: The lid must track the moth. Da always thinks of everything.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You gently lift the mechanical moth. It whirs to life in your palm, wings beginning to flutter.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: (whispering) Find him. Please.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You release the moth. It spirals upward, catching the light, then darts north into the fog.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Now all we have to do is follow it.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: The moth immediately disappears into the night sky. Luckily, you have a way to track it.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: Stay close. These streets are not safe, especially for a young girl and two small companions.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You follow the moth's path, checking the compass. The light leads you deeper into the old district.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: There should be a maze game here, where you follow the moth to the Clockmaker's Guild.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You find yourself in front of the watchmaker's guild. You've been here before. 47 Clockmaker's Lane—an old church, dark stained glass, a strange symbol on the door: a spiral wrapped around a gear. Standing on the steps, you a see a blind old woman, begging.

opening.speaker: Crone
opening.text: Spare a penny for an old lady?

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You pull a penny out of your bag and put it in the woman's hand. She looks at you thoughtfully.

opening.speaker: Crone
opening.text: what a lovely young woman you've turned out to be.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: She can't see you but it feels as if she can see right through you. Then she smiles sweetly at you, and wanders away.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: She smiles sweetly at you, and wanders away.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: why does she feel so familiar to me?

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Come on! the moth is in there.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: you carefully try the door. It's locked, but you recognize the lock. It looks just like the lock on your father's study at home. or almost like.

midpoint.speaker: Rainie
midpoint.text: Wow, this place is creepy! I love it!

midpoint.speaker: Addie
midpoint.text: Stay close. These streets are not safe, especially for a young girl and two small companions.

midpoint.speaker: Narrator
midpoint.text: You follow the moth's path, checking the compass. The light leads you deeper into the old district.

midpoint.speaker: Narrator
midpoint.text: A figure emerges from the mist—an old woman with a clockwork walking stick.

midpoint.speaker: Old Woman
midpoint.text: Lost, little one? These streets eat the unwary. What brings you to this forgotten place?

midpoint.speaker: Veracity
midpoint.text: I'm looking for my father. He... he might be in danger.

midpoint.speaker: Old Woman
midpoint.text: Following the moth, are you? Ah. You seek the Order's meeting house. Clockmaker's Lane is ahead, but child... once you step into their world, nothing is ever the same.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: The door is locked. But the lock is like the ones father builds.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: Your heart races. You've been here before.

mothPuzzle.title: Follow the Moth
mothPuzzle.instructions: The moth darts ahead into the fog. Choose the correct path to follow it.

paths.label: Left Path - Narrow alley between buildings
paths.failMessage: The moth's light disappears into the fog. You've lost it!

paths.label: Center Path - Main cobblestone street
paths.successMessage: The moth's glow remains steady ahead. You're on the right path!

paths.label: Right Path - Through an old courtyard
paths.failMessage: The moth's light disappears into the fog. You've lost it!

choices.text: Find a hiding spot and watch the building. Learn their patterns before entering.
Solve the door puzzle and go in now. We can't waste time watching.

puzzle.title: The Spiral Lock
puzzle.instructions: Connect the gears in the correct sequence to unlock the door.
